title: Current state for wilsonle/speech
status: v0.6.0 release prepared for publication; #255 usability evidence remains open
appIdea: A local-first installable browser PWA for Vietnamese/English dictation, vocabulary steering, guided voice-model enrollment, browser-side personal-model training, encrypted portable voice-model import/export, offline use, and privacy-preserving diagnostics.

workflows.dictate: The default screen is Dictate. If the required speech model is missing, setup appears in place with install/verify/activate progress and model details disclosed. When ready, the user records by holding the microphone button or Space, edits transcript text locally, and uses the transcript menu for new/download/clear actions.
workflows.vocabulary: Vocabulary uses a compact set list with search, on/off state, word counts, row menus, basic word editing, and a single Advanced disclosure for steering, category, prompt inclusion, pronunciation/diagnostic tokenization details, and expert controls.
workflows.models: Models uses a compact voice-model list with state-dependent actions, focused create/enroll/train/results/import/export routes, model detail accordions, blocker-first readiness, four-stage training progress, outcome-first candidate results, and dedicated storage/deletion routes.
workflows.enrollment: Enrollment is one prompt at a time with current voice condition, progress, one recording control, concise quality feedback, and Recording details for SNR, clipping, VAD, alignment, language, storage, and diagnostics.
workflows.training: Training readiness shows blockers first; progress uses Preparing, Training, Checking, and Ready stages while epoch/loss/backend/thread/checkpoint details stay disclosed in Training details.
workflows.import: Import is a dedicated .speechmodel route with choose/unlock/validate/review steps. Hostile-file and archive validation remain worker-owned; incompatible exact-base cases are staged safely and described as requiring the matching speech model.
workflows.export: Export is a dedicated route that defaults to encrypted .speechmodel export, keeps 'Recordings and training checkpoints are not included' visible, puts manifest/hash/crypto details behind Details, and keeps legacy sensitive profile export advanced-only.
workflows.settings: Settings is an index behind the application menu with dedicated Audio, Storage, Privacy, Keyboard shortcuts, Diagnostics, and About routes.
workflows.storage: Storage shows aggregate base-model/profile/training/local-preference sizes and uses dedicated confirmation screens for training-data, one-model, base-model, and all-local-speech-data deletion.
workflows.privacy: Privacy states that audio, transcripts, training, and personal models stay on this device; export/delete/network-isolation actions are visible and detailed docs are linked.
workflows.diagnostics: Diagnostics is intentionally dense, grouped by accordions, and exports a redacted support bundle without participant/private data.

visibleByDefault: privacy or destructive consequences at the point they matter

speech: offline model-pack installation and atomic activation
WebGPU inference with multithreaded WASM fallback where supported
personalization: contextual vocabulary sets with bounded decoder steering
quality checks and resumable profile storage
browser-side frozen-feature personal adapter training prototype
checkpoint, pause, recovery, comparison, activation, rollback, and multi-profile controls
portability: legacy profile export/import retained behind advanced disclosures
privacySecurityCompatibility: personal speech data remains browser-local unless explicitly exported
large archive parsing, hashing, crypto, storage lifecycle, inference, and training remain worker/package-owned

uiArchitecture.uiPackage: packages/ui owns semantic tokens, primitives, feedback components, and testing contracts.
uiArchitecture.webRoutes: apps/web/src/app route-state helpers and route-aware panels implement v0.6 paths with legacy redirects.
uiArchitecture.featureBoundaries: UI components call typed controllers/workers and do not import ONNX Runtime, OPFS path logic, archive parsing, cryptography, or raw worker internals directly.

schemas.modelManifest: Model-pack manifest V3 and browser-training contract remain unchanged by v0.6 UI work.
schemas.profileManifest: SpeechProfileManifestV2 plus V1 migration remain unchanged by v0.6 UI work.
schemas.portableSpeechModel: PortableSpeechModelManifestV1 and encrypted envelope remain the .speechmodel portability contract.
schemas.vocabulary: Vocabulary set/entry schemas remain compatible with v0.5 data and v0.6 UI-only preferences.

intentionalProductBoundaries: No production telemetry, account system, cloud sync, remote support collection, browser extension, native companion, new language/localization, model-quality claim, decorative marketing dashboard, gamification, or generic feature-card home screen was added.
v0.6.0 is a product/UX and frontend architecture release, not a model-quality release.
Production Personal Voice Model accuracy and reference-hardware performance claims remain blocked by ADR 0004 and ADR 0005 evidence boundaries.
openReleaseGates: Issue #255 remains open for final moderated release-usability participant evidence or a separate explicit human release decision that updates the #255 artifact.
Production accuracy/performance claims remain bounded by ADR 0004 and ADR 0005 until evidence exists.
Publication/deployment evidence is issue #258 work and must be completed on the tagged release commit before closing #258.
nextPlanningInstruction: Plan only the user's next requested delta against this current state. Preserve #255, ADR 0004, and ADR 0005 evidence limitations unless the user provides the missing evidence or an explicit human decision. After the next delta completes, generate another cumulative successor snapshot.
